title: Drop Android Support and Keep Windows-Only Code Paths

description: Remove Android platform tree and tooling
details: Delete `src/android/` entirely and delete `tools/android/` entirely. Then remove the Android module/use block from `src/lib.rs`. Ensure no remaining code imports `crate::android`.
notes: Deleted src/android/ and tools/android/ trees. Removed Android module/use block from src/lib.rs. Remaining crate::android references are in core/il2cpp files handled by later tasks (t-003..t-006).

description: Drop Android deps, build args, CI jobs
details: Update `Cargo.toml` to remove the Android target dependency section. Update `build.rs` to remove Android linker args. Update `deny.toml` to remove `aarch64-linux-android`. Update `.github/workflows/ci.yml` to remove the Android clippy job. Update `.github/workflows/create_release.yml` to remove `build-android`, Android artifact upload/download/release entries, and adjust `create-release.needs` to only require `build-windows`. Refresh `Cargo.lock` via Cargo after dependency removal.
notes: Removed Android target dep section + dobby-sys patch from Cargo.toml; removed Android linker args from build.rs; removed aarch64-linux-android from deny.toml; removed clippy-android job from ci.yml; removed build-android job, Android attest/upload, and android artifacts and adjusted create-release needs in create_release.yml. Refreshed Cargo.lock (pruned 30+ Android-only crates).

details: In `src/core/hachimi.rs`, remove Android config field, `.nomedia` creation, and Android branches in `OsOption<T>` and `AssetInfo<T>` while keeping the nested `windows` config shape. In `src/core/utils.rs`, keep only the Windows implementation of `get_data_path()`. In `src/core/updater.rs`, remove Android prompt and Android `run()` path, keeping Windows installer behavior.
notes: Removed Config.android field; simplified OsOption<T> and AssetInfo<T> to Windows-only; removed .nomedia creation; reduced get_data_path() to Windows-only branch; removed Android update prompt and Android run() path from updater.rs; removed now-unused UMAPATCHER constants. Kept nested windows config shape.

details: Delete `src/core/gui/android_keyboard.rs`. Remove Android imports, fields, init values, branches, padding, and `handle_android_keyboard` calls from `src/core/gui/mod.rs`, `instance.rs`, `frame.rs`, `menu.rs`, `window/config_editor.rs`, and `window/first_time_setup.rs`. Keep Windows IME handling and Windows menu/config behavior intact.
notes: Deleted android_keyboard.rs. Removed Android module/exports and ime_cooldown field from mod.rs/instance.rs. Removed Android orientation/keyboard branches in frame.rs. Removed Android imports, notch header branch, WebViewManager in-game browser block, IME padding, and handle_android_keyboard from menu.rs. Cleaned config_editor.rs and first_time_setup.rs Android keyboard/padding. src/core/gui is now Android-free.

description: Break plugin ABI to remove DEX slots
details: Remove Android DEX function pointer fields from `crates/hachimi-plugin-abi/src/lib.rs`. Remove matching host functions and `build_host_vtable()` entries from `src/core/plugin/api.rs`. Bump `API_VERSION` to `8` and set `VTABLE_SLOT_COUNT` to `53` in `crates/hachimi-plugin-abi/src/version.rs`. Update `crates/hachimi-plugin-abi/tests/abi_layout.rs` and the ABI crate README metadata. Remove Android keyboard handling in plugin text edit API.
notes: Removed 4 android_dex vtable fields from ABI lib.rs; bumped API_VERSION 7->8 and VTABLE_SLOT_COUNT 57->53; updated abi_layout test and ABI README metadata. Removed host android_dex_* functions and their build_host_vtable entries in src/core/plugin/api.rs, plus the Android keyboard call in gui_ui_text_edit_singleline.

details: Remove Android-gated hook modules/branches from `src/il2cpp/hook/mod.rs`, `src/il2cpp/hook/UnityEngine_CoreModule/mod.rs`, `src/il2cpp/hook/umamusume/GameSystem.rs`, `Screen.rs`, and `UIManager.rs`. Delete `src/il2cpp/hook/Cute_Core_Assembly/` and Android-only `TouchScreenKeyboard*` hook files if they become unused. Keep generated/shared IL2CPP `android`-named symbols/types unless proven unused by search and build.
notes: Removed Cute_Core_Assembly module/init and deleted its dir. Removed TouchScreenKeyboard/TouchScreenKeyboardType modules/init and deleted files. Removed Android audio capture call in GameSystem.rs. Stripped Android orientation hooks from umamusume/Screen.rs. Removed Android resolution-scaler branch and WaitBootSetup hook from UIManager.rs. Left generated IL2CPP/Unity android-named symbols/types (api.rs, types.rs, windows/symbols_impl.rs) as they are runtime export bindings present on Windows.

details: Run a repository search for `target_os = "android"`, `crate::android`, `aarch64-linux-android`, `tools/android`, `android_dex`, and `zygisk`; resolve code/build hits. Run `cargo fmt --check`, Windows clippy with `-D warnings`, core tests, plugin ABI tests, and training-tracker plugin tests. Do not launch the game. Optionally run `cargo deny check` and `cargo machete` to catch stale target/dependency config.
notes: Repo searches confirm no remaining target_os=android/crate::android/zygisk/android_dex/tools-android references in code/build/CI; only generated IL2CPP/Unity android-named bindings remain (api.rs, types.rs, windows/symbols_impl.rs). cargo fmt applied and clean. cargo check (x86_64-pc-windows-msvc) compiles. clippy --all-targets -D warnings: zero warnings. Tests: core 82 passed, plugin-abi 3 passed, training-tracker 32 passed. cargo machete: no unused deps. cargo deny bans/licenses failures are pre-existing env state (wildcard/duplicate findings unrelated to Android; CI applies egui path patches separately), not introduced by this change. Did not launch the game.
